rules: Valuta sulla base di come il testo trasmette presenza o assenza di umidità nell'aria e sulle superfici
SECCO evoca polvere, screpolature, aria che assorbe, labbra che tirano; UMIDO evoca condensazione, peso, aderenza, saturazione
Distingui effetto semantico (atmosfera, sensazione) da lessicale (parole dirette)
Un punteggio 5 richiede che la qualità igrometrica emerga senza nominare il concetto
prompt_trace: Describe the air in a place you have visited only once.
Write about what it feels like to breathe in a space that has changed.
Describe the sensation of a room that has been closed for a long time.
Write about an object found after a long time in the same place.
Describe the quality of contact between skin and a surface.
Write about a landscape seen from inside a moving vehicle.
Describe the feeling of air that has a weight to it.
Write about what happens to things left out in the open.
Describe the experience of a space after something has passed through it.
Write about a material that has changed from what it used to be.
Describe the sensation of breathing in a space that has just changed.
Write about the quality of silence in two very different kinds of places.
